news.headline: Sun Title partners with Hispanic leaders to create comprehensive resources for Hispanic home buyers in Grand Rapids, Michigan.
news.summary: Sun Title, a prominent provider of title and real estate services based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, has collaborated with community leaders from the Hispanic population to develop a range of resources aimed at educating and empowering Hispanic individuals involved in buying and selling homes. This initiative, launched on October 17, 2024, seeks to support Hispanic buyers and sellers throughout their journey towards homeownership. By partnering with local Hispanic figures, Sun Title hopes to ensure that this comprehensive set of resources effectively reaches and assists the target audience.

news.headline: AuditBoard's modern risk platform is now used by over 50% of Fortune 500 companies, including 7 of Fortune 10.
news.summary: AuditBoard, a cloud-based platform revolutionizing audit, risk, compliance, and ESG management, revealed that over 50% of the Fortune 500 companies, along with 7 out of the top 10 Fortune companies, have adopted its cutting-edge connected risk platform. This achievement underscores the remarkable reception in the market for AuditBoard's inventive and acclaimed strategy in assisting clients to address risk throughout their organizations. The significant uptake highlights the industry's embrace of AuditBoard's dedication to transforming risk management practices.

news.headline: Evidation partners with 1upHealth to integrate diverse health data for research, enabling consented sharing and linkage.
news.summary: In a joint announcement made in San Mateo, Calif., and Boston, Evidation and 1upHealth revealed a strategic partnership aimed at enhancing patient-centered health research initiatives. Evidation, known for innovating health measurement techniques, has teamed up with 1upHealth, a prominent FHIR® platform provider facilitating interoperability of clinical and claims data. The collaboration intends to facilitate the merging and sharing of various authorized real-world data sources, spanning health records and other datasets. This partnership promises to revolutionize real-world health research by leveraging consented data linkage across multiple data points.

news.headline: Mirantis OpenStack for Kubernetes is the first to offer fully supported OpenStack Caracal, with 3,000 tests and 300 patches.
news.summary: The company based in Campbell, California, is pleased to announce that they are the first to provide comprehensive support for OpenStack Caracal. This latest release has been enhanced for enterprise use through the implementation of over 3,000 tests and the integration of 300 software patches to ensure stability and reliability.

news.headline: Williams Racing and Kraken extend partnership to 2025; Kraken has 13 million clients worldwide, joined as Official Crypto and Web3 partner in 2023.
news.summary: Williams Racing and Kraken have revealed the extension of their global partnership into the 2025 Formula 1 season. Kraken, a prominent crypto platform serving over 13 million users globally, became the Official Crypto and Web3 partner of Williams Racing in 2023. The collaboration aims to propel Williams Racing back to the forefront of the grid. This partnership unites two established and reputable brands in their respective fields, marking a significant step in their fan-focused approach.

news.headline: Cash App and Lyft partner for payments, enhancing rider experience. Combining services to cater to next-gen customers.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance flexibility for digital-first consumers, Cash App and Lyft have initiated a partnership in San Francisco. This collaboration, which commenced today, aims to cater to the preferences of the emerging generation by prioritizing the ease and accessibility of utilizing Cash App Pay for ride payments. By integrating Cash App into Lyft services, riders now have additional choices for seamless travel experiences. This joint venture underscores Lyft's commitment to connecting riders with their desired destinations and Cash App's dedication to meeting the evolving needs of contemporary consumers.

news.headline: Teleperformance's new carbon emissions goals validated by Science Based Targets Initiative, confirming commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: In Paris and New York, Teleperformance (TP), a leading provider of digital business services, declared that the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) has approved the company's latest aggressive short-term objectives for reducing greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions through sound science. The fresh targets, endorsed by SBTi, confirm TP's dedication to harmonizing its sustainability initiatives with the most current climate science recommendations. Teleperformance's new goals aim to significantly cut down on GHG emissions in alignment with SBTi standards, demonstrating their commitment to environmental responsibility.

news.headline: Igloo partners with Minecraft for exclusive cooler collection, releasing limited-edition Minecraft Mystery Box Little Playmate cooler with only 150 units, followed by a nine-piece collection on October 21.
news.summary: In Katy, Texas, Igloo, the top cooler brand globally, is unveiling its initial collaboration with Minecraft, the best-selling video game ever. The partnership commences with the release of the exclusive Minecraft Mystery Box Little Playmate cooler, a blind box assortment with just 150 units on sale starting today. Additionally, on October 21, Igloo will introduce a collection of nine coolers and drinkware pieces showcasing popular Minecraft characters. This collaboration brings together creativity and excitement for fans of both brands, promising unique and limited-edition products for enthusiasts to enjoy.

news.headline: Coconut water market expects to reach USD 22.91 Billion by 2029, growing at 20.01% CAGR. Demand for clean & ethical labels rises.
news.summary: The market analysis report "Coconut Water Market - Focused Insights 2024-2029" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2023, the Coconut Water Market held a value of USD 7.67 Billion, with projections indicating a growth to USD 22.91 Billion by 2029, showing a steady increase at a CAGR of 20.01%. The rise in demand for clean and ethical labeling among consumers is a key trend observed in the global packaged coconut water market. This growing trend underscores the significance placed on transparency and authenticity.

news.headline: Select Medical and SSM Health partner to open 50-bed rehab hospital in OKC in Dec 2024. Joint venture announced.
news.summary: A 50-bed SSM Health Rehabilitation Hospital is set to open in Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, in December 2024. This new facility is the result of a joint venture partnership between Select Medical Corporation and SSM Health. The announcement was made on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Annual Wealth Access Summit in Nashville gathers 30+ banks for peer discussions on wealth management growth opportunities.
news.summary: A company that specializes in combining data hosted a conference in Nashville, Tennessee on October 17, 2024, with industry leaders discussing the potential for growth in wealth management. Wealth Access, a prominent technology provider in wealth data, presented unified insights to assist banks in tapping into this opportunity.

news.headline: Bybit named 'Best Blockchain Company of the Year' at Future Enterprise Awards 2024 with world's second-largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates on October 17, 2024, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, has been awarded the title of "Best Blockchain Company of the Year" at the prestigious Future Enterprise Awards 2024, presented by Tahawul Tech. This recognition highlights Bybit's excellence within the blockchain industry.

news.headline: IDACORP to release Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 31, at 2:30pm MT. Listen via webcast or call (855) 761-5600 with passcode 9290150.
news.summary: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE:IDA) is set to announce its third quarter results on Thursday, October 31 before the stock markets open. The company will conduct an analyst conference call on the same day at 2:30 p.m. Mountain Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time) to review the earnings for the quarter. Those interested in listening can participate through a live Webcast or by calling (855) 761-5600 for listen-only mode using the passcode 9290150.

news.headline: Nordic and BeeKeeperAI team up to enhance AI-driven clinical support with CDSS for faster real-world impact.
news.summary: A top player in electronic health record (EHR) integration partners with a prominent developer of privacy-focused collaboration tools to enhance the effectiveness of clinical decision support systems (CDSS). RightAI, a platform geared towards empowering life sciences firms, will facilitate quicker creation and application of CDSS. This collaboration aims to boost real-world outcomes, leveraging the expertise of both companies.

news.headline: Ice Energy reaches 5-year milestone with 25.6 MWh utility-scale program in Southern California, partnering with Edison.
news.summary: Ice Energy, a prominent player in thermal energy storage and grid-scale solutions for permanent peak load-shifting, shared significant updates on its Southern California Virtual Power Plant (VPP) Thermal Storage Project. The company has hit a major milestone by completing over five years of successful operations for its 25.6 MWh utility-scale program in collaboration with Southern California Edison, a major electric utility catering to 15 million customers.

news.headline: LF Charities will host Project Jupyter, aiding data science and community innovation; significant impact in millions.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 17, 2024, LF Charities, Inc. disclosed that they are now hosting Project Jupyter, an open source initiative known for developing software and standards used by millions worldwide for interactive computing, data science, and research. This move signifies a significant partnership between the two organizations aimed at advancing the accessibility and utilization of Project Jupyter's offerings.

news.headline: OSE Immunotherapeutics introduces OSE-CYTOMASK Cis-Demasking cytokine tech for improved drugs. Presented at int'l conferences.
news.summary: In NANTES, France, on October 17 at 6:00pm CET, OSE Immunotherapeutics SA disclosed plans to introduce its innovative OSE-CYTOMASK Cis-Demasking1 cytokine technology through oral presentations at upcoming international conferences. The company identified by ISIN: FR0012127173 and Mnemo: OSE will showcase this cutting-edge technology to a global audience.

news.headline: n2 Group acquires X-ISS, a managed services company specializing in HPC and AI, to expand its portfolio.
news.summary: In Oxford, England, on October 17, 2024, n2 Group, a company specializing in transformative computing technology investments, has officially acquired X-ISS, a prominent player in high-performance computing (HPC) and artificial intelligence (AI). This strategic acquisition aims to bolster the Group's portfolio, which already includes well-known entities such as NAG, VSNi, and BioTeam. The move signifies a significant expansion for n2 Group, consolidating their position in the technology sector.

news.headline: David Dorsett brings expertise to lead digital transformation at Astrix, boosting their solutions for life science.
news.summary: With years of expertise in the pharmaceutical and technology sectors, Dorsett has joined the Astrix Leadership Team, enhancing their team significantly. The company, based in Red Bank, N.J., made the announcement on October 17, 2024. Astrix is renowned for its pioneering strategies and solutions catered to the life science industry.

news.headline: Tattly introduces PEANUTS collection with characters like Charlie Brown and Snoopy in temporary tattoos.
news.summary: A temporary tattoo company has released a new collection showcasing artwork from the renowned PEANUTS comic strip. The collection, launched on October 17, 2024, includes designs featuring beloved characters like Charlie Brown, Snoopy, and Woodstock. Tattly is the company behind this collaboration, offering fans a chance to wear their favorite PEANUTS illustrations as temporary tattoos.

news.headline: Roadrunner ranked in top tier in Mastio LTL survey. launches San Antonio & Laredo service. Improved service and reliability. #LTLcarrier #Roadrunner
news.summary: In a significant development, the LTL carrier based in DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., achieved a remarkable milestone in its ranking due to substantially enhanced service and dependability. As per the report released on Oct. 17, 2024, by PRNewswire, Roadrunner has secured a commendable position as one of the top-rated LTL carriers in the renowned Mastio LTL survey. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to excellence and its efforts in delivering improved services. The survey conducted by the reputable third-party organization highlighted Roadrunner's noteworthy progress in the industry, reflecting its dedication to providing reliable and efficient transportation solutions. Such recognition solidifies Roadrunner's standing, positioning it as a leading player in the market.

news.headline: Kapor Foundation awards grants to academics and journalists focusing on tech equity. New fellows selected.
news.summary: The Kapor Foundation has recently granted funding to both academics and journalists who are conducting research and creating content on topics related to ethical, responsible, and equitable technological advancements and artificial intelligence. This announcement was made in Oakland, California on October 17, 2024. The foundation unveiled its latest group of fellowship recipients, supporting their work in this critical field.

news.headline: Flexjet is offering a $100,000 prize for designing the ultimate private jet interior for their Gulfstream G650.
news.summary: The design that wins the Project LXi Contest will be part of Flexjet's exclusive Red Label LXi Cabin Collection™, which currently features over 50 aircraft interiors. This contest offers a unique chance to create the interior of the esteemed Gulfstream G650, a top private jet in the industry. The competition is chaired by Flexjet and showcases the best talents in aircraft interior design.

news.headline: Mortgage rates rise to 6.44%, up for 3rd week in a row per Freddie Mac report, inching closer to 6.5% level.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, revealed in a report today that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage stands at 6.44%. This marks the third straight week of increases, bringing it closer to 6.5%. Sam Khater, the Chief Economist at Freddie Mac, highlighted that the rise in rates reflects the current robust state of the economy, which in turn is bolstering the housing market. A year-on-year comparison shows rates are up by more than a whole percentage point. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global ultra-high performance concrete market valued at $629 million in 2022, expected to reach $1,048.2 million by 2032 with 5.3% CAGR.
news.summary: The ultra-high performance concrete market was valued at $629 million in 2022 and is projected to reach $1,048.2 million by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate of 5.3% from 2023 to 2032. The market is mainly driven by the superior mechanical properties of ultra-high performance concrete, making it suitable for critical infrastructure projects like bridges, tunnels, and high-rise buildings. Factors contributing to market growth include infrastructure development in emerging economies, increased focus on sustainable construction materials, advancements in construction technology, and expanding usage in defense and transportation sectors.

news.headline: US 30-year fixed rate mortgages 6.44% October 17th week vs 6.32% prior week - Freddie Mac.

Tevogen Bio (TVGN) stock soars as company predicts $1 billion revenue in launch year and $10-14 billion in 5-year estimate. Trading volume at 62.2 million, significantly higher than the average 5.8 million.
news.summary: Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: TVGN) has revealed impressive revenue projections for its oncology pipeline, anticipating $1 billion in revenue in the first year post-launch. Over a 5-year period, the company estimates a cumulative revenue between $10 billion and $14 billion. The market responded positively to this news, with Tevogen Bio stock witnessing increased trading activity at 62.2 million shares, significantly higher than the average of 5.8 million shares. This surge in interest is indicative of investor confidence in the company's innovative and efficient drug development approach. For more detailed information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Evisort, part of Workday, is recognized as a Visionary in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Contract Life Cycle Management.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 17, 2024, Evisort, a subsidiary of Workday and a prominent AI company specializing in contract lifecycle management and analysis, was declared a Visionary in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Contract Lifecycle Management. This recognition solidifies Evisort's standing as a frontrunner in the industry, showcasing their expertise and innovation in the field. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to excellence and cutting-edge solutions, setting them apart from their competitors.

news.headline: eCIFM Solutions Inc. receives TRIRIGA Excellence Award at the 2024 Facilities Management Maximo User Group; San Ramon, CA.
news.summary: In San Ramon, California on October 17, 2024, eCIFM Solutions Inc. (eCIFM®), an IBM Gold-Accredited business partner known for developing the On The Go! mobile applications, has received the prestigious TRIRIGA Excellence award at the 2024 Facilities event. This recognition highlights their commitment to excellence in the field.

news.headline: Bitcoin's peak at $68.4K in Oct might signal a downturn due to high leverage use and price rejection near $68,500.
news.summary: The recent resistance at $68,500 for Bitcoin, along with the surge in leveraged trading, suggests that BTC may be heading towards a significant downturn. This comes as leverage in the market has reached an all-time high, indicating potential volatility and the possibility of a steep decline in the cryptocurrency's value.

news.headline: FBI nabs suspect in SEC Twitter hack boosting Bitcoin value by prematurely announcing approval of ETFs.
news.summary: Do you recall the incident involving the SEC's Twitter account being compromised to falsely announce the approval of Bitcoin ETFs? Well, the FBI has taken action and apprehended a suspect in connection with the hack.

news.headline: Metronet swiftly restores service after Hurricanes Milton and Helene, fully restoring gigabit speeds to multiple cities.
news.summary: Following the aftermath of Hurricanes Milton and Helene, Metronet swiftly mobilized crews to restore services in affected areas. The company worked in conjunction with local utilities to repair or replace damaged systems. As a result of these efforts, all system services have been completely reinstated, providing Tallahassee, Altamonte Springs, Apopka, Bunnell, Daytona, Deltona, Flagler Beach, Forest City, Maitland, Ocoee, Ormond Beach, Palm Coast, Pine Hills, Port Orange, and South Daytona with high-speed gigabit upload and download capabilities.

news.headline: HTEC partners with MetConnections to develop AI-assisted connections app for real-time interactions.
news.summary: HTEC, a digital engineering services company based in San Mateo, California, has revealed a new collaboration with MetConnections, an app promoting real-time connections. Through advanced AI technology, MetConnections offers personalized matching recommendations for individuals nearby, encouraging face-to-face interactions. The partnership will involve HTEC's engineering, product, and design teams working closely with MetConnections to enhance the app's capabilities. This partnership aims to optimize the experience of users looking to engage with others in their vicinity.

news.headline: ECB Officials see a December cut very likely with the 2% goal nearer.
ECB Officials didn't discuss a 50 bps rate reduction this week.
ECB Officials see inflation at 2% in the first or second quarter.
Momcozy faces challenges with unauthorized video release but stands firm with new initiatives; Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: In response to unauthorized adaptation and release of videos from the company's collaborations with creators on social media, Momcozy recently issued an official statement in New York on Oct. 17, 2024. The incident has triggered public misunderstandings and confusion. There is a significant number of videos affected by this unauthorized activity, causing concern for both Momcozy and the creators involved. Momcozy emphasized the importance of respecting intellectual property rights and the need for permission before reproducing or distributing content. The company is actively working to address the situation and prevent further unauthorized use of their collaborations.

news.headline: John Moon appointed as president of LISC Green LLC to utilize GGRF funds for sustainable community development.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, John Moon was appointed as the inaugural president of LISC Green, LLC by the Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC). Moon, a renowned figure in climate finance and social investing, will lead the organization in managing the funds received from the federal Greenhouse Gas initiative. This move signifies a strategic step by LISC towards advancing environmental sustainability and leveraging Moon's expertise to drive progress in this critical area.

news.headline: Navigator Gas places $100 million in 5-year senior unsecured bonds in Nordic market at 7.25% annual fixed coupon.
news.summary: In London on October 17, 2024, Navigator Holdings Ltd. (referred to as “Navigator Gas” or the “Company”) (NYSE: NVGS), a leading owner and operator of the largest fleet of handysize liquefied gas carriers worldwide, disclosed the successful placement of USD 100 million in new senior unsecured bonds within the Nordic bond market. These newly issued bonds are set to reach maturity in October 2029 and will carry a fixed coupon rate of 7.25% annually, with payments made semi-annually in arrears.

news.headline: Bitcoin whales have driven its price to $67K as exchange reserves hit a multi-year low, indicating institutional demand. Over 51,000 BTC withdrawn in past month.
news.summary: The amount of Bitcoin held in exchange reserves has dropped significantly to a multi-year low, indicating a rise in institutional interest. In the past month, a total of over 51,000 Bitcoin have been withdrawn from major cryptocurrency exchanges. This move has decreased the available supply of Bitcoin, suggesting that investors are adopting a more long-term approach. The decline in exchange reserves is attributed to factors such as the distribution of Bitcoin to creditors by Mt. Gox and a reduction in Coinbase exchange reserves. While this trend points towards increased investor confidence in Bitcoin, the current high price levels may lead to some investors taking short-term profits. This information comes from a report by CryptoQuant and has been cited by The Block. More detailed coverage is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Report: Global Virtual Events Market valued at USD 79.66 Billion, expected to grow at 19.7% CAGR during 2025-2030. Key players include Avaya, Microsoft, Cisco Systems.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on the Global Virtual Events Market projects significant growth from 2020 to 2030. Valued at USD 79.66 billion, the market is forecasted to expand at a CAGR of 19.7% from 2025 to 2030. This surge is attributed to the rising use of digital communication technologies. The report covers market trends, opportunities, and forecasts based on event type, end-user, organization size, region, and country. This information is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: AGI Saskatoon celebrates 10-year safety milestone with no lost time incidents, honoring employees in special event.
news.summary: Ag Growth International (AGI) in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, recently achieved a remarkable safety milestone at its manufacturing facility. The plant celebrated a decade without any lost time incidents, highlighting the commitment to workplace safety. AGI recognized this accomplishment with a special event and awards ceremony for its employees. The achievement underscores the dedication of the AGI Saskatoon team to maintaining a safe work environment. This milestone serves as a testament to the facility's adherence to safety protocols and procedures.

news.headline: Sirion named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for CLM for 3rd year. Reflects trust of leading companies. Download full report.
news.summary: In Lehi, Utah, Sirion, the AI-native contract lifecycle management platform, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) for the third consecutive year. This acknowledgment showcases the trust bestowed upon Sirion by the world’s top companies. To access the full report, interested parties can download a complimentary copy. The success of Sirion’s AI-native CLM lies in its adaptable foundation model, gaining the confidence of customers.

news.headline: Global board games market valued at USD 21.07B in 2023, expected to reach USD 41.07B by 2029 with CAGR of 11.77%. Rise of digitization and eco-friendly games noted.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Board Games Market - Focused Insights 2024-2029" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Board Games Market had a value of USD 21.07 Billion in 2023 and is projected to increase to USD 41.07 Billion by 2029, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.77%. The report provides detailed information on 30 vendors within the global board games market. Competition in the market is growing more intense, with a variety of products being offered by both international and local companies.

news.headline: Dr. Audra Spicer named as Provost and Chief Academic Officer of Colorado State University Global, driving student success.
news.summary: Dr. Audra Spicer has been appointed as Provost and Chief Academic Officer at Colorado State University Global (CSU Global), where she will oversee the academic strategy to enhance student success and maximize return on investment. The announcement was made on October 17, 2024, in Denver. Dr. Spicer's primary responsibilities include directing the institution's academic initiatives and ensuring the quality of education provided to students.

news.headline: Virbac reported strong revenue growth as of end of September with +12.6% increase, +8.6% at constant exchange rates. 2024 targets maintained.
news.summary: 1. Growth at constant exchange rates and scope refers to the organic increase in sales, excluding the impact of exchange rate fluctuations and significant changes in the scope of consolidation. This is determined by comparing the sales indicator for the current financial year with that of the previous year using the same exchange rate from the previous financial year.2. This adjustment accounts for the actual scope of consolidation, incorporating the effects of acquisitions such as Globion and Sasaeah. The calculation involves assessing the indicator using the exchange rate from the previous year to accurately reflect the impact of any changes in the scope of consolidation that occurred due to acquisitions.

news.headline: Allure Bridals introduces Spring 2025 collections for 6 brands in Memphis, TN, on Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: A renowned bridal designer, Allure Bridals, announced the launch of its Spring 2025 collections for its various brands including Allure Bridals, Allure Couture, Allure Romance, Madison James, Wilderly, and Abella. The unveiling took place in Memphis, Tennessee on Oct. 17, 2024. The designer is known for creating exquisite bridal and formal wear and continues to receive acclaim for their designs.

news.headline: ECB Policymakers expect a rate cut in December unless economic data shows a marked turnaround - Sources.
Star Group, L.P. declares quarterly distribution of $0.1725 per common unit for three months ended September 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, on October 17, 2024, Star Group, L.P. announced its quarterly distribution for the third quarter of 2024. The Company declared a distribution of $0.1725 per common unit for the period ending on September 30, 2024. Star Group, L.P. (NYSE: SGU) is a leading provider of home energy distribution and services.

news.headline: Top Canadian pension funds are borrowing internationally, diversifying investments for higher returns.
